title: Sharing Between Organizations
excerpt:
Is there a way to move/share items between other organizations in monday.com? 
For example, say our company works closely with another company that has a monday.com account, and we have boards that are setup the same bet…

posts.author: bglick (Bradley Glick)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to move/share items between other organizations in monday.com?

For example, say our company works closely with another company that has a monday.com account, and we have boards that are setup the same between the two - could we or the other company move and share items with the other? I know it’s probably not possible but thought it might be worth a shot!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @bglick,

It is possible to copy boards/dashboards across accounts via our cross-account copier, however I understand that this may not be the most efficient process as it does require you to take a few steps. That said, do let me know if this is along the lines of what you’re looking to achieve
